elements.original_description: A shiny new gadget with buttons and lights, placed in the center of a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a shiny new electronic gadget with glowing buttons and indicator lights, clean flat vector art, centered on a pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients, sharp edges, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
